items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Toews, Stanley Cup and Olympic champ, retires
items.summary: Jonathan Toews, a three-time Stanley Cup champion with the Blackhawks and two-time Olympic gold medalist with Canada, has announced his retirement.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Eala's Berlin Open run reaches semis after Svitolina upset
items.summary: Alex Eala has claimed another huge upset to advance into the Berlin Open semis -- this time taking out world No. 8 Elina Svitolina.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
